## ERT1.3. Rate of using available airspace structures (PI#11) {#ert1.3.-rate-of-using-available-airspace-structures-pi11 .Heading-2-ER}

POLAND reports that:

- The ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **46%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- The ratio of use of the available airspace structures is **77%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)
